ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "well_name" TEXT /* Name of the well */,
  "well_type" TEXT /* Type of the well (e.g., horizontal, vertical) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the well */,
  "well_status" TEXT /* Current status of the well (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "depth" REAL /* Total depth of the well */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the well location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the well location */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of well operations */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of well operations */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Name of the company or operator managing the well */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for data versioning */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the well record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well the zone belongs to */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone (e.g., IBZ, Middle, Upper) */,
  "zone_type" TEXT /* Type of the zone (e.g., Montney, Duvernay) */,
  "depth_from" REAL /* Depth from which the zone starts */,
  "depth_to" REAL /* Depth to which the zone ends */,
  "zone_status" TEXT /* Status of the zone (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "zone_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the zone */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for data versioning */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the zone record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zones_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "completion_technologies" (
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each completion technology */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well the technology was used in */,
  "tech_name" TEXT /* Name of the completion technology (e.g., Open Hole Ball-Drop, Plug and Perf) */,
  "tech_type" TEXT /* Type of the completion technology */,
  "tech_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the completion technology */,
  "tech_status" TEXT /* Status of the completion technology (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for data versioning */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the technology record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tech_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_completion_technologies_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proppant_usage" (
  "proppant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proppant usage record */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well the proppant was used in */,
  "proppant_type" TEXT /* Type of proppant used */,
  "proppant_amount" REAL /* Amount of proppant used (in tonnes) */,
  "proppant_grade" TEXT /* Grade of the proppant used */,
  "proppant_source" TEXT /* Source of the proppant */,
  "proppant_cost" REAL /* Cost of the proppant */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for data versioning */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the proppant usage record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proppant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proppant_usage_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hydraulic_fracturing" (
  "frac_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hydraulic fracturing record */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well the fracturing was performed on */,
  "frac_fluid" REAL /* Volume of fracturing fluid used (in m3) */,
  "frac_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the fracturing (in m3/min) */,
  "frac_pressure" REAL /* Pressure of the fracturing operation */,
  "frac_temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the fracturing operation */,
  "frac_depth" REAL /* Depth at which fracturing was performed */,
  "frac_status" TEXT /* Status of the fracturing operation (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for data versioning */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the fracturing record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frac_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hydraulic_fracturing_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drill_and_complete" (
  "dc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drill and complete record */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well the drill and complete operation was performed on */,
  "dc_cost" REAL /* Cost of the drill and complete operation (in millions) */,
  "dc_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the drill and complete operation */,
  "dc_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the drill and complete operation */,
  "dc_status" TEXT /* Status of the drill and complete operation (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "dc_operator" TEXT /* Name of the company or operator performing the drill and complete operation */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for data versioning */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the drill and complete record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drill_and_complete_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well the report was generated for */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., completion report, operational report) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "report_author" TEXT /* Name of the author of the report */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for data versioning */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the report record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well the invoice was generated for */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "invoice_amount" REAL /* Amount of the invoice */,
  "invoice_status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "invoice_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the invoice */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for data versioning */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the invoice record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., drilling engineer, completion specialist, data analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the well data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the well data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)
